description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Lint CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: clang-format, cmake-format, and clang-tidy, each running on ubuntu-20.04. The clang-format job should install clang-format, check out the code, format specified C++ files, and exit with a non-zero status if there are any changes. The cmake-format job should set up Python, install cmakelang, check out the code, list specified CMake files, and check their format. The clang-tidy job should install clang-tidy, check out the code, install CMake and gtest, configure and run a build with clang-tidy, and exit with a non-zero status if there are any changes.
